settings.title: What is Factor Form?
settings.content: Factor Form is a line of food-first supplements designed to support your daily wellness routine. Our products are made with real, whole-food ingredients and backed by clinical research.

settings.title: How do I take Daily Greens?
settings.content: Simply mix one packet with 8-12 oz of cold water, juice, or your favorite smoothie. We recommend taking it first thing in the morning for best results.

settings.title: Is there a subscription option?
settings.content: Yes! Subscribe and save up to 20% on every order. You can customize your delivery schedule, skip or cancel anytime — no commitment required.

settings.title: What's included in the Welcome Kit?
settings.content: Your free Welcome Kit includes a premium shaker bottle, sample packets of our best-selling formulas, and free shipping — a $36 value, on us.

settings.title: How long does shipping take?
settings.content: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Free shipping is available on all subscription orders and orders over $50.
